name: Jupiter Swap Intent Agent
description: Jupiter quote and swap-intent template that prepares capped user-signed trade intents without backend transaction signing.
degenPitch: Jupiter route preview, wallet signs if the max pain still looks sane.
whatItDoes: Creates Jupiter quote and intent shapes.
Hashes risk config into the trade intent.
Keeps live submit gated behind client signature and explicit live gate.
cursorPrompt: Build a Jupiter Swap Intent Agent with DNA x402. Create quote and trade intent shapes, bind riskConfigHash, require user wallet signature for live submit, and reject backend signing.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Jupiter Swap Intent Agent with DNA x402. Create quote and trade intent shapes, bind riskConfigHash, require user wallet signature for live submit, and reject backend signing.
receiptProofBehavior: Receipt binds intent ID and route digest.
